wine_experiences.name: Truffle Hunt and Barolo Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Half-day hunt for Alba white or summer black truffle with a trifulau and his dog in the Langhe hills, closing with a Barolo tasting paired to truffle-shaved cheese. Run by Meet Piemonte.
wine_experiences.duration: Around 4 hours including hunt and tasting

wine_experiences.name: Casa di Langa Vespa Vineyard Tour
wine_experiences.address: Localita Talloria 1, 12050 Cerretto Langhe CN, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Guided Vespa rides and bike rentals from the Casa di Langa resort through the UNESCO Langhe hills, weaving between Barolo and Barbaresco vineyards. Requestable as a self-ride or escorted experience.
wine_experiences.price_range: On request to resort and Vespa partner

wine_experiences.name: Barolo by Vespa Cru Ride
wine_experiences.description: Escorted Vespa ride through the Barolo cru villages with a winery stop and tasting, departing from the village of Barolo. A vintage-Vespa way to take in the eleven-commune amphitheatre.

wine_experiences.name: E-Bike Barolo Vineyard Experience
wine_experiences.address: Via Aie Sottane 4, 12060 Barolo CN, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Guided e-bike ride through the Barolo cru with a winery visit and wine-and-food tasting, leaving from the village of Barolo. Pedal-assist makes the steep cru climbs accessible to most riders.

wine_experiences.name: Casa Martini Vermouth Class
wine_experiences.address: Piazza Luigi Rossi 2, Frazione Pessione, 10023 Chieri TO, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on vermouth experience at Casa Martini where guests balance botanicals to build their own Vermouth di Torino, following the Martini masters. Includes guided tastings of the house range.

verified.address_quoted: Piazza Luigi Rossi, 2 - Frazione Pessione - 10023, Chieri

wine_experiences.name: Distillerie Berta Bertanic Picnic
wine_experiences.address: Via Guasti 34/36, Frazione Casalotto, 14056 Mombaruzzo AT, Italy
wine_experiences.description: Berta's Bertanic experience at the Mombaruzzo distillery: a cellar and alembic-museum visit followed by a picnic in the estate park with grappa, liqueur and amaretti tastings.
